---
id: set-outdated
title: "Set outdated value"
description: "Set's 'outdated' flag indicating the base translation was changed without updating current translation."
sidebar_label: "Set outdated value"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set outdated value"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/translations/{translationId}/set-outdated-flag/{state}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Set's "outdated" flag indicating the base translation was changed without updating current translation.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
